name: Multiple Sequence Alignment
description: Multiple sequence alignment (MSA) using MMseqs2. Generates MSAs using the ColabFold MMseqs2 pipeline: searches UniRef30 and extends results with the ColabFold environmental database (BFD/MGnify-derived).
capabilities: Generates MSAs using the ColabFold MMseqs2 pipeline: searches UniRef30 and extends results with the ColabFold environmental database (BFD/MGnify-derived)

sequence.description: Protein amino acid sequence to generate a multiple sequence alignment using MMseqs2. Use ':' to separate chains for multimers.

msaDatabase.description: Database for MSA generation. Searches UniRef30 and ColabFold environmental database.
